tool.name: Run Collapse Engine
tool.description: Orchestrate the Collapse Engine workflow to transform high-fidelity analogies into scoped, testable research artifacts. Run the full workflow or specific phases.

session_id.description: ID of the collapse session to run

phases.description: Specific phases to run (default: all remaining)

use_sub_agents.description: Whether to spawn sub-agents for parallel constraint extraction

ai.systemPromptSection:
### run_collapse_engine
Orchestrate the Collapse Engine workflow. Use this to check session status and get guidance on next steps.
whenToUse: User wants to check collapse workflow status
User wants guidance on next steps
